user_prompt: Critical: assault cannon requires a cycling
prayer:
Approach the assault cannon with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's wrath upon its Machine Spirit.
Initiate the cycling operation, chanting the Litany of Relentless Barrage to align its rotary mechanisms.
Anoint the spinning barrels of the assault cannon with sacred ablative oils, beseeching smooth revolution.
Verify the assault cannon's cycling through diagnostic runes, sanctifying its furious rhythm in the Emperor's name.

Kneel before the cryogenerator, beseeching its frosty Machine Spirit to awaken.
Commence the operation with precise incantations, modulating cryogenic flows through sanctified conduits.
Purify the cryogenerator's heat-sink matrices with blessed refrigerants, invoking Omnissianic equilibrium.
Conclude the operation by intoning the Canticle of Absolute Zero, affirming the Machine Spirit's chill dominion.

Extend mechadendrites towards the microbead, whispering the Rite of Vox-Awakening to its spirit.
Engage diagnostics, scanning vox-frequencies for corruption whilst anointing crystal lattices.
Beseech the microbead's Machine Spirit to reveal anomalies through binaric cantrips.
Sanctify the microbead post-diagnostics with the Oil of Clarity, praising the Omnissiah's clarity.

Approach the codifier in solemn procession, invoking purification upon its tainted data-veins.
Chant the Exorcism of Errant Code, purging the codifier's spirit with electro-flails of sanctity.
Anoint its logic-cores with myrrh-infused solvents, beseeching the Omnissiah for uncorrupted transmission.
Seal the codifier's purification through auspex verification, honouring its reborn Machine Spirit.
